basic_details.job_title: AHSSP Dhenkanal Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Anchaliika Higher Secondary School Pragyanvihar Dhenkanal
basic_details.short_information: Anchaliika Higher Secondary School Pragyanvihar Dhenkanal (AHSSP Dhenkanal) Guest Faculties Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. Have been announced through the AHSSP Dhenkanal Guest Faculties Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate with 55% marks and B.Ed.
qualification.details: Post Graduate with 55% marks and B.Ed.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Anchaliika Higher Secondary School Pragyanvihar Dhenkanal (AHSSP Dhenkanal).

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name is Guest faculties.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Guest faculties post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Post Graduate degree with 55% marks and a B.Ed. qualification.

faq.question: Q5. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 10-06-2026 for English, Odia, and Sanskrit, and on 11-06-2026 for Chemistry, Mathematics, and Biology(Botany).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type is Contractual.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Dhenkanal, Odisha.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring their Biodata and all original certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific age limits mentioned for the Guest faculties post?
faq.answer: The age limit details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data; candidates should refer to the official notification.
